analysis:
【今日摘要】
今天市場情緒較為複雜，部分公司股價出現大幅波動。三星記憶體股價下跌22%，而特斯拉股價則大幅上漲6.2%。摩根大通表示石油價格已經下跌至每桶68美元，霍爾木茲海峽重新開放，石油市場的局勢正在急劇改變。美國股市大幅下跌，受中國DeepSeek引發的AI整體下滑影響。紐約金屬交易所金、銀價格下跌。市場話題中獲得關注的科技、媒體與電信相關公司包括DeepSeek、SoFi 等。

【結語】
投資者應該保持冷靜和謹慎，避免被市場情緒左右。長期投資實際報酬率超過 10% 的年化率實際上是非常罕見的。投資者應該根據自己的風格和目標設定合理的投資策略和時間表。同時，投資者也應該保持警惕，避免被市場的波動所左右。

【精選個股】
VRTX - Vertex Pharmaceuticals Incorporated - Vertex Pharmaceuticals Incorporated (VRTX)可能正在與Crinetics Pharmaceuticals, Inc.進行合併與收購談判。
ZETA - Zeta Global Holdings Corp. - Zeta Global Holdings Corp. 公布了其 AI 戰略的演進，包括基礎設施轉型和戰略夥伴關係的建立。
ONDS - Ondas Inc. - Ondas Inc.與DZYNE Technologies, LLC進行企業併購洽談，相關資訊將透過幻燈片呈現。

風險提醒：投資者應該謹慎評估每個公司的基本面和市場情況，避免被市場情緒左右。

items.title: This ESG ETF Owns Google and Intel but Won’t Touch Meta, and It’s Up 22% in a Year
items.summary: An ESG-screened equity fund has quietly delivered a big year while sitting out one of the most-traded megacap names on the market. The iShares MSCI KLD 400 Social ETF (NYSEARCA:DSI) climbed 22.29% in the year ending July 2, 2026, riding an AI-heavy roster that includes Alphabet and Intel. What it does not own is Meta ... This ESG ETF Owns Google and Intel but Won’t Touch Meta, and It’s Up 22% in a Year
items.zh_title: 這隻ESG ETF持有Google和Intel，但不投資Meta，今年上漲22%
items.zh_point: 這隻以環境、社會和治理（ESG）為篩選標準的股票基金，今年上漲22.29%，投資組合中包含了Alphabet和Intel等AI相關公司，但卻避免了Meta。

items.title: Should You Buy CrowdStrike After Its Recent Stock Split? The Answer Might Surprise You.
items.summary: CrowdStrike stock has rocketed higher by 70% this year.
items.zh_title: 你應該買入 CrowdStrike 股票嗎？最新的股票分割後的答案可能會讓你意想不到
items.zh_point: CrowdStrike 股票今年已經上漲了 70%，但你是否應該買入股票？答案可能會讓你意想不到。

items.title: Micron Stock Is Down 22% From Its High. Is the Trillion-Dollar Chipmaker's Dip a Buy?
items.summary: The memory maker recently posted the best quarter in its history. So why are the shares well off their peak?
items.zh_title: 三星記憶體股價下跌22%，這個超過1兆美元的芯片巨頭的跌幅是否是買入的好機會？
items.zh_point: 儘管三星記憶體最近公布了歷史上最好的季度財報，但股價卻遠離了峰值。

items.title: Tesla (TSLA) Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
items.summary: Shares of electric vehicle pioneer Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) jumped 6.2% in the afternoon session after the company expanded its Robotaxi service to Miami, building on positive momentum from its recent stronger-than-expected second-quarter delivery report.
items.zh_title: 特斯拉(TSLA)股價大幅上漲，需要注意的事項
items.zh_point: 特斯拉股價在下午交易時段大幅上漲6.2%，主要原因是該公司在迈阿密推出擴展的無人駕駛計程車服務，並延續了其近期強勁的第二季度交付報告的正面動能。

items.title: JPMorgan sends blunt verdict on oil, economy
items.summary: Oil was at $107 a barrel in May. Tankers were sailing thousands of miles out of their way. Refiners in Asia were bidding up whatever crude they could find that did not have to pass through the Strait of Hormuz. None of that is true anymore. Brent settled near $68 on July 6. The Strait is open. And ...
items.zh_title: 摩根大通對石油與經濟的直接判斷
items.zh_point: 摩根大通表示石油價格已經下跌至每桶68美元，霍爾木茲海峽重新開放，石油市場的局勢正在急劇改變。

items.title: World Cup in photos: Balogun controversy looms over U.S.-Belgium match, Ronaldo bows out
items.summary: The U.S. heads into its Round-of-16 World Cup match against Belgium with focus on Folarin Balogun after FIFA suspended his one-match red-card ban.
items.zh_title: 世界盃照片：美國與比利時對戰前巴洛根爭議升溫，羅納爾多退役
items.zh_point: 美國隊進入十六強世界盃對比利時比賽，焦點轉移至巴洛根，因FIFA暫停了一場紅牌禁賽的處罰。

items.title: Samsung Electronics sees record preliminary 2Q profit but shares fall
items.zh_title: 三星電子預估第二季盈餘創歷史新高，但股價下跌
items.zh_point: 三星電子預估第二季盈餘創歷史新高，但股價卻出現下跌，可能與市場對未來業績的不確定性或是其他因素相關。

items.title: Stock futures are little changed after Dow tops 53,000 for first time: Live updates
items.summary: Monday night's action follows a winning session on Wall Street.
items.zh_title: 道瓊指數突破53,000點，股市未來趨勢不明朗
items.zh_point: 道瓊指數在星期一晚上達到53,000點的里程碑，隨後股市未來趨勢出現不確定性，投資者正在密切關注股市的發展。

items.title: Balogun to start for U.S. vs. Belgium after Trump defends call to FIFA
items.summary: FIFA reversed Folarin Balogun’s suspension after Trump sought a review, letting the U.S. striker play Belgium as officials objected.
items.zh_title: 特朗普挺巴洛古恩，美國將讓他上場對抗比利時
items.zh_point: 美國足球員巴洛古恩因違規被禁賽，但特朗普出面干預，FIFA最終決定撤銷禁賽令，讓他能夠參與美國對比利時的比賽。

items.title: Graham Platner denies sex assault claim as Democrats urge him to quit Maine Senate race
items.summary: Graham Platner hopes to unseat Republican Sen. Susan Collins, but the Democrat's campaign is reeling from a bombshell allegation by Jenny Racicot.
items.zh_title: 格雷厄姆·普拉特納否認性侵指控 美民主黨呼籲他辭去緬因州參議院選舉
items.zh_point: 格雷厄姆·普拉特納參選緬因州參議院，希望取代共和黨參議員Susan Collins，但他的競選活動因為一名名叫Jenny Racicot的女性指控他性侵而陷入困境。

items.title: Trump calls Walmart ‘patriotic’ for cutting beef prices — in a stark change of tune
items.summary: The president hasn’t always approved of Walmart’s moves, having criticized the chain’s response to tariffs last year.
items.zh_title: 川普稱沃爾瑪為「愛國者」為了削價牛肉 — 這是他態度的重大轉變
items.zh_point: 川普總統在去年曾批評沃爾瑪對關稅的回應，但現在卻稱沃爾瑪為「愛國者」因為其降低牛肉價格。

items.title: The Nasdaq-100 has been far more volatile than the S&P 500. Now add SpaceX to the mix.
items.summary: While SpaceX is due to join the Nasdaq-100 on Tuesday, it won’t become part of the S&P 500 for at least another year — likely furthering the volatility spread between those two indexes.
items.zh_title: 納斯達克百強指數比標準普爾500指數更為波動。現在加入太空探索技術公司的混局。
items.zh_point: 太空探索技術公司即將加入納斯達克百強指數，但至少需要一年才能加入標準普爾500指數，從而可能使這兩個指數之間的波動差距进一步拉大。

items.title: U.S.-Belgium match could draw record TV audience amid the Trump World Cup controversy
items.summary: Some industry experts are predicting all-time viewing records for a U.S. soccer game
items.zh_title: 美國比利時比賽可能吸引歷史最高收視人數
items.zh_point: 美國國家足球隊在即將到來的世界盃比賽中，可能會創下收視人數的新紀錄。這是由於特朗普總統的世界盃爭議引起的關注，許多人都想觀看這場比賽。

items.title: Your data built the AI boom — but Big Tech is pocketing 100% of the equity
items.summary: Your share of the AI wealth is a right — not a handout. Here is how we claw back our money.
items.zh_title: 你創造了 AI 的繁榮 — 但大科技公司卻囫囵 100% 的股權
items.zh_point: 你對 AI 的財富有份 — 這不是施捨，而是你的權利。以下是如何回收你應得的錢。

items.title: Your investing expectations are more than double the reality. Here is the tough truth.
items.summary: Long-term real returns above 10% annualized are exceedingly rare.
items.zh_title: 你的投資預期遠超實際。這是你需要面對的真相。
items.zh_point: 長期投資實際報酬率超過 10% 的年化率實際上是非常罕見的。

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: 美國股市大幅下跌，受中國DeepSeek引發的AI整體下滑影響
items.zh_point: 美國股市大多下跌，Nasdaq指數領跌，AI基礎設施製造商遭遇大幅下跌，Nvidia下跌16%。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: 紐約金屬交易所金、銀價格下跌
items.zh_point: 紐約金屬交易所金價下跌1.4%，銀價下跌2.5%，連續兩天金價下跌，三天內銀價下跌三次。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 中國深度尋找 AI 的要點
items.zh_point: 中國新興企業宣稱已經訓練出高性能的 AI 模型，且成本低廉，無需使用最先進的晶片。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: 深度尋找不會沉淪美國AI巨頭
items.zh_point: 對於Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭的股價下跌，恐慌情緒過於誇大。
